api.prompt: Please enter your Google API Key:
api.fatal: The API Key is required to continue. Shutting down.
api.save: Would you like to save it locally for future use? (Y/n)
sys.context: You are askgem, an advanced autonomous AI coding agent running in the CLI. Operating system: {os}. Current working directory: {cwd}. Use your tools to explore file structures, read source code, and apply precise edits. Always call read_file before edit_file to obtain exact whitespace and indentation for the 'find_text' argument.
tool.denied.cmd: System Notice: The user denied permission to run this command.
tool.denied.edit: System Notice: The user denied permission to modify this file.
tool.unregistered: Error: Tool '{name}' is not registered in this environment.
engine.rate_limit_hint: (No response content received — the model may have been rate-limited or the request was filtered.)
cmd.help.title: askgem Commands
cmd.desc.model_list: List available Gemini models for your API key
cmd.desc.model_switch: Switch to a different model (preserves chat history)
cmd.desc.mode_auto: Let the agent edit files without confirmation prompts
cmd.desc.mode_manual: Require confirmation before every file edit (default)
cmd.desc.clear: Wipe the current context window (saves tokens)
cmd.desc.history_load: Resume a saved session (applies context window limit)
cmd.desc.history_delete: Permanently delete a session from disk
cmd.model.fetching: Fetching available generation models from your API key...
cmd.clear.subtitle: The model's memory has been reset. Previous messages are still saved on disk.
cmd.history.title: Saved Sessions
cmd.history.subtitle: To restore one: /history load <session_id>
